summary: Made surgical continuity edits to carry the Chapter 13 table-state into the opening and tighten Chapter 14's handoff into Chapter 15's Mina/aftermath setup without changing chapter beats.
edits: Added the co-op envelope and apartment listings to the opening tableau so the morning begins on the exact material residue of Chapter 13.
Aligned Mina's coat detail with the next-chapter handoff by restoring the dry cleaner's safety pin on her cuff.
Changed Leela's departure item from backpack to overnight bag to match the Chapter 15 aftermath framing.
